name: divedra-workspace
description: TypeScript/Bun workflow runtime for cooperative multi-agent execution

scripts.build:server: bun build src/main.ts src/lib.ts --outdir dist --target bun && bun build packages/divedra-core/src/index.ts --outfile packages/divedra-core/dist/core-runtime.js --target bun --minify && bun build packages/divedra-addons/src/index.ts --outfile packages/divedra-addons/dist/index.js --target bun && bun build packages/divedra/src/index.ts --outfile packages/divedra/dist/lib.js --target bun && bun build packages/divedra/src/cli.ts --outfile packages/divedra/dist/cli.js --target bun && bun build packages/divedra/src/bin.ts --outfile packages/divedra/dist/main.js --target bun && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json --emitDeclarationOnly && bun run scripts/sync-package-declarations.ts && rm -rf dist/prompts packages/divedra/dist/prompts packages/divedra-core/dist/prompts packages/divedra-addons/dist/prompts && cp -R src/workflow/prompts dist/prompts && cp -R src/workflow/prompts packages/divedra/dist/prompts && cp -R src/workflow/prompts packages/divedra-core/dist/prompts && cp -R src/workflow/prompts packages/divedra-addons/dist/prompts
scripts.lint: bun run lint:biome && bun run typecheck
